author: Pokémon 公式
text:
2026 Pokémon North America International Championships Preview Show
Tune in for a special 2026 NAIC Preview Show where our experts—top players and broadcast talent alike—break down all the storylines heading into the big event.

Learn the latest on the 2026 season, including which players are already in the hunt for a big win and what to expect from the Pokémon TCG, Pokémon VGC, Pokémon GO, and Pokémon UNITE metagames at NAIC! There will be player interviews, roundtable discussions between casters and players, and more to build excitement leading up to the event.

Think you know better than our experts—or just want to have your voice heard? Contribute to the show by voicing your opinions or submitting questions to the panel via X (formerly known as Twitter) beforehand for a chance to have yours featured in the stream.

Event Registration, Pairings, and General Info: https://pkmn.news/upcomingevents 
Competitive News and Updates: https://x.com/playpokemon
